leadText: Solaceon Town (Japanese: ズイタウン Zui Town) is a town in central Sinnoh. It is located between Route 209 and Route 210, while also being the location of the Solaceon Ruins. It is a fairly small town with a tiny village community.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The music heard in Solaceon Town is the same music heard in Pastoria City . This is the only area in Sinnoh where Dive Balls can be obtained in Pokémon Diamond and Pearl . Solaceon Town is on the longest non-event straightway path in Sinnoh, spanning not only Solaceon but parts of Route 209 and Route 210. Origin [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Pokémon world in relation to the real world → Sinnoh Solaceon Town may correspond to Ashoro , a town in the Tokachi Subprefecture of Hokkaido . The town's main industries include dairying and farming.
